/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shared_udp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/shared_udp.dir/shared_udp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shared_udp.dir/udp.cpp.o -o shared_udp   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 -ludp /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
